diff -up '/usr/local/src/ports-current/ports/german/BBBike/Makefile' '/tmp/BBBike/Makefile'
Index: ./Makefile
--- ./Makefile	Sat Feb  6 02:13:55 2010
+++ ./Makefile	Sat Mar 20 15:00:43 2010
@@ -6,8 +6,8 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	BBBike
-PORTVERSION=	3.16
-PORTREVISION=	2
+PORTVERSION=	3.17
+PORTREVISION=	1
 CATEGORIES=	german
 MASTER_SITES=	SF/${PORTNAME:L}/${PORTNAME}/${PORTVERSION}
